summary: Duplicate Contract Feature Testing Complete - Backend 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend UI verified for both Doula and Midwife. All duplicate contract API endpoints and UI buttons working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Duplicate button visible on both Midwife and Doula contracts pages)

seed_data_creation: Duplicated contracts created during testing with '[Copy of...]' prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Duplicate contract feature fully tested and working. Backend APIs POST /api/midwife/contracts/{id}/duplicate and POST /api/doula/contracts/{id}/duplicate both create new Draft contracts with null client_id and '[Copy of...]' client_name prefix. Frontend 'Duplicate' buttons visible on contract cards for both Midwife and Doula roles.

features_tested.midwife_duplicate_api: PASS - POST /api/midwife/contracts/{id}/duplicate returns 200 with new contract
features_tested.midwife_duplicate_creates_draft: PASS - Duplicated contract has status='Draft', client_id=null
features_tested.midwife_duplicate_copy_prefix: PASS - Duplicated contract has '[Copy of...]' client_name prefix
features_tested.midwife_duplicate_clears_signatures: PASS - client_signature and midwife_signature are null
features_tested.midwife_delete_api: PASS - DELETE /api/midwife/contracts/{id} works for Draft contracts
features_tested.midwife_ui_duplicate_button: PASS - Duplicate button visible on contract cards (15 instances found)
features_tested.doula_duplicate_api: PASS - POST /api/doula/contracts/{id}/duplicate returns 200 with new contract
features_tested.doula_duplicate_creates_draft: PASS - Duplicated contract has status='Draft', client_id=null
features_tested.doula_duplicate_copy_prefix: PASS - Duplicated contract has '[Copy of...]' client_name prefix
features_tested.doula_delete_api: PASS - DELETE /api/doula/contracts/{id} works for Draft contracts
features_tested.doula_ui_duplicate_button: PASS - Duplicate button visible on contract card

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login - Authentication for both midwife and doula

duplicate_contract_behavior.client_id: Set to null - requires new client selection
